title: Ram© 6 X Multicoloured Textured Sensory Baby Balls Sensory Teething Exploration Balls And Engagement Balls
features: The Ram 6 X DIFFERENT TEXTURE BALLS - For tactile exploration; gentle squeaking sound when squeezed
Developmental benefits: Soft and textured material featuring 6 varied sizes and shapes, which encourage baby to reach, bat, grab and enjoy sensory play
LIGHTWEIGHT & EASY TO HOLD - Sized perfectly for baby's hands, easy to grasp and hold
DEVELOPS BABY'S TACTILE DEVELOPMENT - This toy is to cultivate baby's spatial perception, hearing ability, eye-hand coordination, color & shape recognition and hands-on innovation ability
GIFT BOX INCLUDED - Easy to store and transport, comes in its original colourful gift box
